name: Knowledge Base
description: A help / docs center for a product: hero search prompt, three help categories, and a live article list backed by the data API (token to write, public to read).
prompt: Build a help center for <product>: a nav, a 'How can we help?' hero, a features section with three help categories (Getting Started, Guides, FAQ) each with a real description, an article list that fetches from the articles collection and renders article cards (with sample articles shown when empty), and a footer.
